implemented_changes.change: Added bounded I2C1 bus recovery routine that deinitializes I2C1, clocks SCL manually, emits a STOP condition, and reinitializes the peripheral.
Runtime MPU6050 register and bulk reads/writes now invoke one recovery-assisted retry after I2C failure.
SSD1306 command/data writes now invoke one recovery-assisted retry after I2C failure.

root_cause_summary: Violent motion alone does not create an obvious infinite-loop path in Attitude_Update.
The more plausible freeze path is a motion-induced MPU6050 transport fault that leaves shared I2C1 unhealthy, affecting both IMU and OLED traffic.

verification.build_blocker: cmake executable not available in current environment
